mapper.select: SELECT w.wishlist_id AS wishlistId, w.user_id AS userId, w.place_id AS placeId, w.category AS category, w.api_id AS apiId, w.created_at AS createdAt, w.price AS price, IFNULL(p.name, w.item_name) AS placeName, IFNULL(p.region, 'API/WEB') AS placeRegion, IFNULL(p.category, w.category) AS placeCategory, IFNULL(p.image_url, w.image_url) AS imageUrl FROM wishlists w LEFT JOIN places p ON w.place_id = p.place_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY w.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wishlists (user_id, place_id, category, api_id, item_name, image_url, price) VALUES (#{userId}, #{placeId}, #{category}, #{apiId}, #{placeName}, #{imageUrl}, #{price})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wishlists WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND place_id = #{placeId}
mapper.select: SELECT wishlist_id AS wishlistId, user_id AS userId, place_id AS placeId, category, api_id AS apiId, item_name AS placeName, image_url AS imageUrl, created_at AS createdAt FROM wishlists WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND place_id = #{placeId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wishlists WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND api_id = #{apiId} AND category = #{category}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wishlists WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND api_id = #{apiId} AND category = #{category}
